breaking_news_suggestions.headline: One Fix Destroys the Map: How the Dome's Refraction Patch Collapses Its Coordinate System
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Section 1.8 fully rewritten as 'The Coordinate Collapse.' The dome's refraction fix — declaring the sun's altitude an optical illusion — invalidates the dome's own position coordinates, contaminating 22+ confirmed WIN predictions simultaneously. The new section provides a comprehensive structural critique with quantitative analysis.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Major new prose argument about a structural cascade failure. Not an incremental fix — a full rewrite with new title and framing.
